_model_comment: Stable endpoint used; paper used gemini-2.5-pro-preview-05-06 — results not directly comparable.

metrics_all._comment: Metrics over all 489 instances. The 15 API failures produced no response and were forced to pred=False — unfairly counted as wrong answers. Use 'metrics' below for fair evaluation.
metrics_all._api_failures_note: Parse failures == API failures (same 15 instances; no response means nothing to parse).

metrics._comment: Metrics excluding the 15 API/parse failures (474 instances with valid responses).

_expected_comment: Paper results from Table 4 (CoRe Lite, control dependency, gemini-2.5-pro-preview-05-06).
